CVE-2012-10017.title: A vulnerability was found in BestWebSoft Portfolio Plugin up to 2 ...
CVE-2012-10017.description: A vulnerability was found in BestWebSoft Portfolio Plugin up to 2.04 on WordPress. It has been classified as problematic. This affects an unknown part. The manipulation leads to cross-site request forgery. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. Upgrading to version 2.06 is able to address this issue. The patch is named 68af950330c3202a706f0ae9bbb52ceaa17dda9d. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The associated identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-248955.

CVE-2014-125109.title: A vulnerability was found in BestWebSoft Portfolio Plugin up to 2 ...
CVE-2014-125109.description: A vulnerability was found in BestWebSoft Portfolio Plugin up to 2.27. It has been declared as problematic. This vulnerability affects the function bws_add_menu_render of the file bws_menu/bws_menu.php. The manipulation of the argument bwsmn_form_email leads to cross site scripting. The attack can be initiated remotely. Upgrading to version 2.28 is able to address this issue. The name of the patch is d2ede580474665af56ff262a05783fbabe4529b8. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. The identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-248956.

CVE-2023-23685.title: Auth. (contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabil ...
CVE-2023-23685.description: Auth. (contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in RadiusTheme Portfolio – WordPress Portfolio plugin <= 2.8.10 versions.

CVE-2025-58245.title: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cro ...
CVE-2025-58245.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in bestweblayout Portfolio  allows DOM-Based XSS. This issue affects Portfolio : from n/a through 2.58.
